violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Recently changed sanitizer bucket not testing at proper concentration. Recommend storing fewer wiping cloths in bucket to help maintain proper levels.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Broken drain plug lever at 3 tub sink. Recommend repair.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Buildup of debris under ice machine and cold hold units. Needs cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Water damaged floors in coffee prep area. Exposed aggregate/unsealed.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Mop placed in utility sink. Store in a position that allows proper drying.
Receptacles, covers/lids, adequate number, clean, insect/rodent proof, storage, frequency, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
